summary: Deliverable incomplete. Critical: label-rules.json missing (required by Invoke-PrLabelAssigner.ps1, will cause runtime failure). act-result.txt required artifact not provided. Workflow references PrLabelAssigner.Tests.ps1 without evidence of that file existing. Actionlint validation never run/evidenced. act execution never performed/evidenced. No task requirements met (TDD process unexposed, validation artifacts absent). Code issues: ConvertGlobToRegex (lines 22-58) lacks comments explaining glob→regex transformations; run-act-tests.ps1 uses Unix-specific /tmp/ path; missing Set-StrictMode in scripts; workflow installs actionlint in bash but never validates .yml with it.
